fields.description: YARN-1051 introduces a ReservationSytem/Planner that enables the YARN RM to handle time expilicitly, i.e. users can now "reserve" capacity ahead of time which is predictably allocated to them. This is an umbrella JIRA to enhance the reservation system by integrating with FairScheduler, RM failover mechanism, etc.
